title: Meghalaya honeymoon murder: Trial court grants bail to accused wife
description: A court in Meghalaya has granted bail to a Indore woman who was arrested last year for allegedly conspiring to murder her husband during their honeymoon in East Khasi Hills. She is accused of conspiring to murder her husband, in a plot allegedly carried out with her alleged lover Raj Kushwaha and three others.In the bail order dated April 27, District and Sessions Judge DR Kharbteng found that the police had failed to properly communicate the charges to the accused, Sonam Raghuvanshi.“In no
